$comment: GOLDEN VECTORS for the canvas binary wire protocol (contracts/canvas-wire.json). Each entry pairs a source frame (canvasId, frameId and the guest DrawList ops, in the SAME JSON shape the JSON path emits) with its EXACT on-the-wire encoding as a lowercase hex string. The Rust encoder (crates/rill-guest/src/canvas_encode.rs) is the ORACLE that produces 'hex' byte-for-byte; the future TS decoder must reconstruct the frame from 'hex' — so encoder and decoder cannot silently drift together. Vectors assume a FRESH encoder per frame (intern table starts empty, indices from 0), header.flags = NONE, all scalars little-endian, all numbers f64. GENERATED by the canvas_encode.rs test (RILL_REGEN_CANVAS_GOLDEN=1 cargo test -p rill-guest --features wip-binary-protocol canvas_golden_in_sync). DO NOT EDIT BY HAND.

vectors.name: empty
vectors.description: Zero ops: header + inline canvasId + empty intern table. The irreducible floor of a frame.

vectors.name: arc-cw
vectors.description: arc clockwise (ccw = 0): x,y,r,start,end + a u8 bool.

vectors.name: arc-ccw
vectors.description: arc counter-clockwise (ccw = 1) — exercises the u8 bool = 1 path.

vectors.name: set-fill-style
vectors.description: setFillStyle interns one color (index 0) and references it.

vectors.name: set-stroke-style
vectors.description: setStrokeStyle interns one color (index 0) and references it.

vectors.name: fill-text
vectors.description: fillText with x, y then INLINE ASCII text (u32 len + UTF-8).

vectors.name: set-transform
vectors.description: setTransform with the full 6-element affine matrix (a,b,c,d,e,f).

vectors.name: repeated-colors
vectors.description: Intern dedup: '#f00' appears in THREE ops but is stored ONCE (index 0); '#00f' is index 1. The table holds two entries, not four.

vectors.name: fill-text-multibyte
vectors.description: fillText whose text is multibyte UTF-8 ('café ☕ 日本語'): textLen is the BYTE length, greater than the char count.

vectors.name: mixed-frame
vectors.description: A realistic frame: save, style, filled backdrop, a stroked poly-line path, a text label, restore. Exercises intern reuse, inline text, path ops and the transform stack together.

vectors.name: at-limit-ops
vectors.description: An at-limit frame of exactly limits.maxOps beginPath ops — the decode-amplification boundary the host validates opCount against before its loop.
